_comment: This file is populated by the Checkov GitHub Actions stage (Stage 10 in ci.yml).
_note: Run 'checkov -d infrastructure/ --output json > reports/checkov_report.json' locally to generate a real report.

passed_checks.check_name: Ensure all data stored in the S3 bucket is securely encrypted at rest
Ensure the S3 bucket does not allow public access
Ensure S3 bucket has MFA Delete enabled
Ensure the ALB protocol is HTTPS
passed_checks.resource: Not applicable — no ALB in this architecture

passed_checks.check_name: Ensure all data stored in the Launch configuration EBS is securely encrypted
Ensure that EC2 is EBS optimised
Ensure Instance Metadata Service Version 1 is not enabled
Ensure ECR Image Tags are immutable
Ensure ECR image scanning on push is enabled

skipped_checks.reason: Default VPC security group is not used — dedicated k3s security group is configured. Skip acknowledged in ci.yml.
